workflow: Evidence-based (CBMI does not perform processing; chain evaluates artifacts + manifest)
aggregator: block-of-blocks; within-block weighted averages with redistribution when evidence absent or path-N/A
global_gate_action: Sets pre_processing_score = 0. The named flag fires with severity CATASTROPHIC.
verification_status_field: Separate categorical field reporting CP-related quality. VALUES: VERIFIED, UNVERIFIED_NO_CPS, UNVERIFIED_INSUFFICIENT_CPS, UNVERIFIED_CP_CLUSTERED, UNVERIFIED_CP_NOT_INDEPENDENT, UNVERIFIED_CP_TRUST_LOW. NEVER score-gating. PP_NO_INDEPENDENT_VERIFICATION flag (CRITICAL-informational) fires when verification_status != VERIFIED. Reasoning: surveys can be high-quality without check points; absence of verification does not invalidate the survey quality.
null_handling: No null state. Score always computes from the four scoring blocks. The CP situation is reported via verification_status, not as a null.
scope_note: Evidence-based confidence score for pre-processing outputs. CBMI does NOT perform processing — this chain evaluates artifacts (geotagged images, GCP coord file, CP coord file) and a declared processing manifest. Optional processing report deepens diagnostic depth. Runtime-independent of drone_score, base_station_score, gcp_score, check_point_score — does not read their outputs. Cross-subsystem coupling (e.g., "CP reliability degraded by base risk") belongs in future capture_score.
source_file_set: Geotagged image set, GCP coord file, CP coord file, processing manifest. Optional processing report.
paths_supported: AUTONOMOUS / PUBLISHED_BENCHMARK / CORS / CLOUD / CUSTOMER_SUPPLIED / LOCAL_BASE_PPK (path-aware indicators only evaluate when their applies_to_paths matches)
known_limitations: False fix / antenna PCO errors that do not manifest in σ are NOT detectable from artifact evidence alone — caught downstream at processing-stage check-point residuals. Processing-report-dependent indicators (cors_data_continuity, time_sync_residual, gcp_residual, cors_station_health) score as advisory only when report is not uploaded — operational reality is that reports are not reliably uploaded. Settings-actuality validation requires uploaded processing report (Approach 2). Without report, chain validates declared settings only (Approach 1) — operator-declarative misrepresentation not detectable. Approach 3 (independent project-type validation against expected settings) deferred to v2 — requires CBMI to maintain expected-settings reference per project type. Software-version scoring deferred to v2 (SD5) — v1 carries known-buggy-versions flag as advisory only with zero scoring weight; real scoring when CBMI maintains buggy-version list. Approximately 6 of the 42 catalogued problems are NOT detected by pre_processing_score: target washed away (handed to processing_score), stockpile toe ambiguity (handed to volume analytics), monsoon flight artifacts (cross-handoff to drone chain), and others. Documented in problem_coverage_map. Vegetation DTM unreliability is an inherent photogrammetry limitation — chain documents but cannot remove. Undisclosed site localization not detectable from artifact evidence — only detectable when operator addresses it in manifest (declared-only). CRS/projection sanity checks compare against survey bounding box for plausibility; cannot verify absolute correctness when bounding box itself is in wrong frame.
